caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the white text "YOU NEED TO" and "SV7" sits in a room filled with framed photographs on the wall. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone. In the background, a white mannequin stands next to a clothing rack. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left featuring a circular icon and the words "THE BIG" and "PODCAST," and another on the right that says "BOOSTY" and "TDT" in red and white. The man maintains a smiling expression throughout the sequence, looking toward someone off-screen. As the scene progresses, his facial expression shifts slightly, and he begins to speak or laugh, with his mouth opening wider in the final frames while his gaze remains directed to the side.
